transport.client_to_launcher: same-user Windows named pipe using length-prefixed protobuf frames
transport.launcher_to_backend: backend process stdin/stdout using length-prefixed protobuf frames

runtime_cases.trigger: send a client named-pipe frame with malformed protobuf payload or invalid length framing
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe sends malformed client input and records that the launcher rejects it without retaining stale client/backend state.

runtime_cases.trigger: backend emits a stdout frame whose declared payload exceeds the configured backend frame limit
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe backend emits an oversized stdout frame and records that no stale backend payload is routed to a TSF client.

runtime_cases.trigger: client sends METHOD_INIT with an unmapped or unavailable TypeDuck profile/backend bridge
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe starts launcher without a usable bridge mapping and records a bounded init failure response.

runtime_cases.trigger: backend accepts a request but does not answer before the request timeout
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe backend hangs and records that the waiting client receives a timeout response before launcher restart/cleanup.

runtime_cases.trigger: backend stdout/read error or crash forces launcher restart handling
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe backend closes unexpectedly and records an explicit degraded restart response.
